# Activity module (CRUD + AI recommendations)

### Description
Full CRUD for activities + daily AI-generated activity recommendation.

### Checklist
- [ ] Scaffold ActivityModule (controller, service, DTOs)
- [ ] CRUD endpoints: POST / GET /:id / PATCH /:id / DELETE /:id
- [ ] `GET /api/v1/activities/today` — calls AI to generate today's idea
- [ ] Unit tests
